description: Phase 40: Continuous Evolution - Create governance framework, sustainability practices, and evolution policies for post-launch. Includes product council, architecture review, security audit, bug bounty, AI safety review, and sunset policy.
steps: Create docs/governance/product-council.md documenting: weekly product council meeting structure, decision-making framework, feature prioritization matrix, stakeholder input process
Create docs/governance/architecture-review.md documenting: monthly architecture review cadence, ADR (Architecture Decision Record) template, technical debt tracking, review checklist
Create docs/governance/release-cadence.md documenting: quarterly major feature ships, release train schedule, feature flag lifecycle, staged rollout process
Create docs/governance/security-audit.md documenting: annual security audit scope, third-party audit partners criteria, vulnerability disclosure process, remediation SLAs
Create docs/governance/bug-bounty.md documenting: bug bounty program structure, severity tiers and rewards, scope (in/out), responsible disclosure timeline, hall of fame

Create docs/governance/ai-safety-review.md documenting: AI safety review board composition, review triggers (new model, capability change), safety testing requirements, bias monitoring, output filtering policies
Create docs/governance/sunset-policy.md documenting: feature/app sunset criteria, user notification timeline (90 days), data export guarantee, migration path requirements
Create packages/governance/src/types.ts with: GovernancePolicy, ReviewCadence, ReleaseGate, SunsetCriteria, BugBountyTier, SafetyCheck interfaces

Create packages/governance/src/release-gates.ts with: ReleaseGateChecker class (validates quarterly release criteria: all tests pass, security scan clean, performance budget met, accessibility audit passed, documentation updated)
Create packages/governance/src/sunset-checker.ts with: SunsetChecker class (evaluates feature usage, identifies sunset candidates, generates migration plans)
Create packages/governance/src/safety-monitor.ts with: AISafetyMonitor class (tracks AI output quality, flags safety concerns, bias detection metrics, automated safety test suite)
acceptance_criteria: All governance documentation files exist with substantive content
Product council doc defines weekly cadence and decision framework
Architecture review doc includes ADR template
Security audit doc defines annual scope and remediation SLAs
Bug bounty doc defines tiers, rewards, and scope
AI safety review doc defines board composition and review triggers
Sunset policy defines 90-day notification and data export guarantees
Release gate checker validates all required criteria
findings: All governance docs created. packages/governance typechecks and passes 56 tests (release-gates 12, sunset-checker 19, safety-monitor 25).
